summary.concern: Stephanie and Marc Felton — 20 overdue tasks

paragraphs: Still holding at 78 overdue — the backlog isn't shrinking. 16 tasks are actively in progress — that's solid execution across the board. 3 tasks should be active but are stuck waiting on blockers — these need immediate attention.

**Stephanie and Marc Felton:** The oldest overdue task is 18 days past due with 20 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **16 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. $37,128 in payments coming due this week — prepare funds.

**Clifford Clack — Gym Addition:** The oldest overdue task is 16 days past due with 15 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **7 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. 7 payment tasks due this week.

PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **12 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. 3 payment tasks due this week.

**Ginger Brown:** Overdue count is climbing — now at 8. The PM needs to get ahead of this before it cascades. **16 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. $21,350 in payments coming due this week — prepare funds.

**Rohini Williams (CNG2025-496):** The oldest overdue task is 7 days past due with 5 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **5 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. $16,163 in payments coming due this week — prepare funds.
**Lingyan Qiu (CNG2025-458):** **3 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. 3 payment tasks due this week.

194 tasks starting in the next 7 days. **77 of those have nobody assigned** — these need a name on them before they're due or they'll become overdue with no accountability. 20 overdue payments are holding up the pipeline — every day these sit, the schedule slips further. **$62,664 in payments going out this week** across 39 tasks — make sure funds are available. $41,553 expected in from 4 client payments. Heavy week ahead for Clifford Clack — Gym Addition and Katie Holmes & Sean Springs — make sure resources are lined up.

Angel Pacheco: Angel Pacheco has 25 overdue across 2 projects with 2 tasks active.

**Katie Holmes & Sean Springs:** 15 overdue (oldest: 17d) — review and reschedule tasks that have truly slipped. **4 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 29 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.

**Clifford Clack — Gym Addition:** 15 overdue (oldest: 16d) — review and reschedule tasks that have truly slipped. 1 active-blocked — clear the blockers to keep moving. **7 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 35 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Lingyan Qiu (CNG2025-458):** Clean — 1 tasks in progress. **3 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 25 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Recommendation:** Block 2 hours today to clear the oldest overdue tasks first. If a task is genuinely behind and can't be completed soon, update the schedule dates so we have accurate data.
Jeff: Jeff is trending in the right direction — overdue is down to 13. Keep the momentum going.
